chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حُسْنِ الظَّنِّ بِاللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 34 – Goodly thoughts about Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (45/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (45/ 8)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ حُسْنُ الظَّنِّ بِاللَّهِ أَنْ لَا تَرْجُوَ إِلَّا اللَّهَ وَ لَا تَخَافَ إِلَّا ذَنْبَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Al Minqary, from Sufyan Bin Uyayna who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The goodly thoughts about Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is that you do not hope except in Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and do not fear except for your sins’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad al- Minqari from Sufyan ibn ‘Uyayna who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘To be hopeful toward Allah means not to have hope in anyone except Allah and not to be afraid of anything but one’s sins.’”
